scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w sloparena-api" "npm run dev -w sloparena-web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sloparena/shared && npm run build -w sloparena && npm run build -w sloparena-api && npm run build -w sloparena-web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @sloparena/shared && npm run build -w sloparena-api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @sloparena/shared && npm run build -w sloparena-web
